name: construction contractors managing 5–15 government contracts/month tool
description: For construction contractors managing 5–15 government contracts/month, compliance reporting delays cause supplier penalties. We automate report generation instead of manual report generation using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Difficulty in generating timely compliance reports for government contracts.
features: user-friendly dashboard for tracking compliance status
